{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2025-64529", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 2.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:U"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "### Impact

Users who 
1. use the exclusion operator somewhere in their authorization schema
1. have configured their SpiceDB server such that `--write-relationships-max-updates-per-call` is bigger than 6500
1. issue calls to WriteRelationships with a large enough number of updates that cause the payload to be bigger than what their datastore allows

will 

1. receive a successful response from their `WriteRelationships` call, when in reality that call failed,
2. receive incorrect permission check results, if those relationships had to be read to resolve the relation involving the exclusion

### Patches

Upgrade to v.145.2.

### Workarounds

Set `--write-relationships-max-updates-per-call` to `1000`.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0024, "percentile": 0.15046}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pm3x-jrhh-qcr7", "github_reviewed_at": "2025-11-13T22:58:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pm3x-jrhh-qcr7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pm3x-jrhh-qcr7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-64529"}], "nvd_published_at": "2025-11-10T23:15:42Z", "published_at": "2025-11-13T22:58:20Z", "references": ["https://github.com/authzed/spicedb/security/advisories/GHSA-pm3x-jrhh-qcr7", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-64529", "https://github.com/authzed/spicedb/commit/d0cd103a92cc1915636733fb1d1730c2c7f74851", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pm3x-jrhh-qcr7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/authzed/spicedb/security-advisories/GHSA-pm3x-jrhh-qcr7", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/authzed/spicedb", "summary": "SpiceDB WriteRelationships fails silently if payload is too big", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-14T20:54:59Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-pm3x-jrhh-qcr7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.45.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/authzed/spicedb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.45.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: SpiceDB WriteRelationships fails silently if payload is too big
